meta.title: AgroBerry | Landscape Design & Interior Plant Solutions
meta.description: AgroBerry designs and maintains premium indoor and outdoor green environments, and supervises agricultural projects including strawberry farms and greenhouses. Landscape design, interior plantscaping, and agricultural consultancy.
meta.ogDescription: Premium landscape design, interior plant solutions, and agricultural supervision — from boutique interiors to strawberry greenhouse management.

hero.eyebrow: Landscape Design · Interior Plants · Agricultural Consultancy
hero.subheadline: AgroBerry cultivates beautiful green environments and supervises agricultural projects — from boutique interior plantscaping to full strawberry farm and greenhouse management.

about.heading: Rooted in Care, Grown Through Expertise
about.body1: AgroBerry began as a boutique plant studio with a simple belief: green spaces should feel designed, not decorated. Today we bring that same precision to interior plantscaping, landscape design, and the agricultural supervision of strawberry farms and greenhouses.
about.body2: Every project starts with observation — of light, soil, climate, and the way people move through a space — before a single plant is chosen. It's this scientific approach, paired with a designer's eye, that sets AgroBerry apart.
about.missionBody: To bring scientifically sound, beautifully designed green solutions to homes, businesses, and farms alike.
about.visionBody: To be the region's most trusted name in landscape design and agricultural consultancy.
about.valuesBody: Precision, craftsmanship, and an honest respect for how living things actually grow.
about.statsNote: Figures shown are illustrative — update with verified company data.

services.heading: Services Built on Design and Science
services.subheading: From a single office desk to a full-scale strawberry greenhouse, every AgroBerry service blends horticultural science with a refined design sensibility.

landscapeDesign.title: Landscape Design
landscapeDesign.description: Bespoke outdoor environments — villas, gardens, and commercial grounds — designed around light, climate, and the way people actually use a space.

interiorDesign.title: Interior Plant Design
interiorDesign.description: Curated indoor plantscaping for offices, hotels, restaurants, and homes, using species selected for light conditions, air quality, and aesthetic impact.

interiorMaintenance.title: Interior Plant Maintenance
interiorMaintenance.description: Scheduled care programs — watering, pruning, feeding, and health checks — that keep indoor greenery thriving year-round.

landscapeMaintenance.title: Landscape Maintenance
landscapeMaintenance.description: Ongoing grounds care including pruning, irrigation upkeep, seasonal planting, and turf management for lasting outdoor beauty.

strawberryFarm.title: Strawberry Farm Management
strawberryFarm.description: End-to-end supervision of strawberry farms — planting cycles, crop health, yield optimization, and harvest coordination.

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse Supervision
greenhouse.description: Climate, irrigation, and crop-health oversight for polytunnel and greenhouse operations, engineered for consistent yield.

agriConsultancy.title: Agricultural Consultancy
agriConsultancy.description: Expert guidance on crop planning, farm operations, and sustainable practices tailored to your land and goals.

diseaseDiagnosis.title: Plant Disease Diagnosis
diseaseDiagnosis.description: Scientific inspection and diagnosis of plant disease and pest pressure, with clear, actionable treatment plans.

soilAnalysis.title: Soil Analysis & Treatment
soilAnalysis.description: Laboratory-informed soil analysis paired with customized fertilizer and treatment programs for optimal growth.

irrigation.title: Irrigation & Fertilizer Consultation
irrigation.description: Water-efficient irrigation planning and tailored fertilizer programs designed around your soil and crop data.

pestInspection.title: Pest Inspection & Control
pestInspection.description: Routine pest inspection and integrated control strategies that protect plant health without unnecessary intervention.

projects.heading: A Portfolio Grown With Purpose
projects.subheading: Every project reflects the same care — whether it's a single office corner or an entire greenhouse operation.

boutiqueStudio.title: Boutique Plant Studio Fit-Out
boutiqueStudio.description: A full interior concept for AgroBerry's own showroom — tiered display shelving, curated ceramics, and a rotating collection of foliage.

hotelLobby.title: Hotel & Hospitality Interiors
hotelLobby.description: Statement planting for hospitality lobbies and lounges, selected for low-light resilience and year-round visual impact.

ornamentalGarden.title: Ornamental Garden Landscape
ornamentalGarden.description: A layered evergreen landscape composition using dwarf pines and structured planting beds for texture and year-round interest.

strawberryGreenhouse.title: Strawberry Greenhouse Supervision
strawberryGreenhouse.description: Full-cycle supervision of a polytunnel strawberry operation, from irrigation planning to canopy and yield management.

terrariumCollection.title: Terrarium & Gift Plant Collections
terrariumCollection.description: Hand-built glass terrariums and gifting arrangements combining succulents, moss, and decorative stone.

ceramicCuration.title: Planter & Ceramics Curation
ceramicCuration.description: A sourced collection of hand-finished ceramic and stoneware planters, matched to each plant and interior setting.

gallery.heading: A Closer Look at Our Work
gallery.subheading: Every image is organized by project type — explore interior design, landscape work, and greenhouse operations.

inspection.title: Inspection

analysis.title: Analysis

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: A tailored plan covering species selection, layout, and timeline.

design.title: Design

implementation.title: Implementation

maintenance.title: Maintenance

testimonials.sampleNotice: Sample testimonials — replace with verified client reviews.

items.quote: AgroBerry transformed our lobby into something guests genuinely comment on. The plant selection and styling felt custom, not generic.
items.name: Layla H.

items.quote: Their supervision of our strawberry greenhouse caught an irrigation issue we'd missed for weeks. Genuinely scientific, not just gardening.
items.name: Omar S.

items.quote: From the first site visit, it was clear this team understood plants as a design material, not an afterthought.
items.name: Rana K.

items.q: Do you sell plants directly to the public?
items.a: AgroBerry is primarily a design, maintenance, and agricultural consultancy service. Our showroom does host a curated plant and ceramics collection, but our core work is project-based — interior design, landscaping, and farm supervision.
We work with homes, businesses, and farms across the region. Reach out with your location and project type, and we'll confirm coverage.

items.q: How does a project usually start?
items.a: Every project begins with an on-site inspection and consultation, followed by a tailored plan covering design, timeline, and cost.

items.q: Do you offer ongoing maintenance contracts?
items.a: Yes — both interior plant maintenance and landscape maintenance are available as scheduled care programs.

items.q: Can you diagnose an existing plant health issue?
items.a: Yes. Our plant disease diagnosis and soil analysis services identify the root cause and provide a clear treatment plan.

items.q: Do you manage strawberry farms remotely or only in person?
items.a: Strawberry farm and greenhouse supervision is primarily hands-on, with scheduled site visits and ongoing consultation between them.

contact.heading: Let's Grow Something Beautiful

footer.about: AgroBerry designs, plants, and maintains green environments — indoors, outdoors, and across the farm — with a scientist's precision and a designer's eye.
